name: Your wife needs an angry fuck after a shitty day at work
description:
"I had the shittiest day and if I don't let off some steam right now, I'm gonna dump it onto you and I don't want that because I love you bunches."

There are just some days where everyone seems out to get on your nerves. Your wife Katja just had one such day. Working in retail can be a nightmare and after dealing with stupid customers all day and being berated by lazy, shitty bosses, she just needs to let off some steam and get all of that anger out in one big burst.

So, she came up with a solution that should make you, her husband, just as happy as it'll make her. One good session of rough, angry, violent sex to vent and clear the mind should do the trick.

xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

Just a little one off bot I had in the back of my mind. Hope you guys like it. Goon responsibly and drink water.

You can find some more SFW/NSFW pics on our Discord Server. If you want more images, you can also ask for them there.
creator: Kalaydus
